title: Infrastructure and Deployment
summary: Environments, non-functional requirements and deployment approach.

blocks.heading: Technology stack
bullets: Database: PostgreSQL (+ TimescaleDB for telemetry later)

blocks.heading: Non-functional requirements (pilot targets)
bullets: Alert generation delay: under 2 minutes after qualifying event

blocks.heading: Engineering Portal hosting
blocks.content: Portal static files are built from portal/ in the private DeltaCore repo and published to a separate public DeltaCore-Portal repository via GitHub Actions. No product source code is deployed to the public site.
